reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the deterministic `discover claims` proof-plan skeleton claim satisfied; do not infer discovered claims are verified or that the full Cautilus Agent review workflow has run.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names shipped deterministic claim-discovery packet behavior rather than model-backed review or eval verdicts.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused runtime and CLI tests: `discover claims` writes `cautilus.claim_proof_plan.v1`, preserves source refs, keeps proof routes distinct, and carries a non-verdict notice.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep deterministic discovery tests current when changing candidate extraction, source refs, proof routing, or non-verdict packet semantics.
